label: WF4 — Generating an Icon
title: A professional icon gives your GPT visual identity. It signals that this is a deliberate tool, not a casual conversation.
subtitle: GPT Configuration

label: WF4 — Why This Structure Works
title: Every instruction in your GPT serves a purpose: role definition, process constraints, output format, and safety rails. Remove any one and the tool degrades.
subtitle: Instruction Architecture

label: WF4 — The Calibration Principle
title: Don't accept 'good enough.' If the output format isn't right, go back to the instructions and fix it. Calibration is what turns a chatbot into a tool.
subtitle: Calibration

label: WF4 — Validation Checklist
title: Before you submit anything a GPT produces: verify facts, check tone, confirm structure, and have a human review it. The tool assists—you decide.
subtitle: Human-in-the-Loop
